_note: REVISED goals set (post Fable expert review + Claude compliance gate-check). NOT the active goals.json until you approve. Harness contract (frozen with the goals): every command is shell-portable, deterministic, LLM-free (StubAgent + respx + recorded fixtures; NO live API; NO tesseract binary on the measurement host — OCR via recorded fixture tokens behind an OCR Protocol stub). Entry points self-sync agent/.venv via `uv pip install` on import-probe failure. Exit-code contract: 0 + bare number on last stdout line = measured; 2 = usage error; 3 = ENVIRONMENT ERROR (stale venv, missing dep/binary, empty scan corpus, failed scanner self-proof) with NO number printed, so an env problem reads as env-error to `measure`, never a fake 0 or a false regression. phi_check.py exits 3 unless (a) the scanned corpus is non-empty and contains the expected event families {doc.ingest, extraction.run, guideline.retrieve, worker.handoff, verification.result} AND (b) a planted-PHI sensitivity self-proof flags first. web_check.py runs `npm ci` when node_modules is absent then build + vitest. F4b (medical_problem+allergy write-back) is a user-elected DEFERRABLE extension and is deliberately NOT counted in any frozen target (it still counts via the acceptance_pass_rate denominator if built). Feature targets equal the criteria counts in backlog.md. 48 criteria total across 7 feature metrics.

metrics.name: Week-2 acceptance pass rate (%) over all feature suites
Existing repo suite pass rate (%) — agent/tests + agent/evals regression guard
PHI occurrences in captured logs/traces/eval artifacts (guarded scanner + self-proof)
Verification: citation union + repo CRUD + document/guideline grounding, fail-closed
Ingestion: settings/pricing + doc pipeline (stub OCR) + upload_document to OpenEMR
Hybrid RAG: corpus ingest + FTS/pgvector + RRF + rerank fallback + de-identified egress
Graph: supervisor + 2 workers + critic, logged handoffs, NESTED spans, 7-key observability fields
API: /v1/documents + evidence + OpenAPI-sync + graded /ready + JSON logging + SLO artifact + packaging files
Frontend: build + vitest infra + ProvenanceChip variants + bbox overlay geometry + upload + citation adapter
Eval gate: 50-case/5-rubric golden set + >5% regression blocking + self-proof + git-hook/GitLab-CI wiring
